evidence_summary: VN-13 routes سَرِيًّۭا from populated text into renderer/case-role backfill, without claiming live rich certification.
VN-13 flags سُهُولِهَا as a token-only suffix-bearing noun; the attached possessor cannot be hidden behind the host gloss.
VN-13 marks صَفْوَانٍ as populated but not rich-renderer certified.
VN-13 carries فَجْوَةٍۢ as token-only renderer metadata, not an apply packet.
VN-13 routes كَثِيبًا to token-only rich metadata with case/role review.
VN-13 keeps نَقْعًۭا token-only for renderer/case metadata.
VN-13 repeatedly flags sky/heaven rows for article-aware renderer backfill.
VN-13 explicitly preserves component candidates for وَٱلشَّمْسُ while blocking propagation-safe certification.
VN-13 flags أَحْرَصَ for finite/dictionary gloss and POS review; this sample records the exact-address nominal gate.
VN-13 marks مَطَرَ as a known defect: noun hover may leak verb infinitive wording.
VN-13 routes بِمُصْرِخِكُمْ to preposition/attached relation review and blocks host-only rich certification.
VN-13 report names صَبَبْنَا among finite verb rows needing exact form, voice/aspect, and subject/agreement review.
